TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciku ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,828 buwan, 6,794 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 3,939 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 2,855 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 37%, Bunun 4%, Tayan 3%, Paywan 2%, Truku 8%, Puyuma 1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciku hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciku hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciku hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Ciku hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Ciku hya' ga Tuwapun. tay 'zil na Ciku hya' ga Tasutasunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiku ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, pujuma *%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa tuwapun. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa tas~ɕutas~ɕunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ciku ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,828 buwan, 6,794 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 3,939 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 2,855 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 37%, Bunun 4%, Tayan 3%, Paywan 2%, Truku 8%, Puyuma 1%, Sakizaya 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciku hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciku hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciku hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Ciku hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Ciku hya' ga Tuwapun. tay 'zil na Ciku hya' ga Tasutasunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiku ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, pujuma *%, s~ɕakizaja *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa tuwapun. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiku ħjaʔ ɣa tas~ɕutas~ɕunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
